metadata.title: Nano Banana Pro | AI Image Editing and Generation
metadata.description: Create and edit images with Nano Banana Pro. Fast image generation, conversational editing, and production-ready visual workflows in one place.
metadata.keywords: Nano Banana Pro, Nano Banana, AI image editing, AI image generation, image to image, text to image

sign.email_verification_hint: Use an email address you can access. You must verify your email after signing up.
sign.verify_email_sent: Verification email sent. Please check your inbox.
sign.verify_email_required: Please verify your email address before signing in.
sign.resend_verification_sent: Verification email resent. Please check your inbox.
sign.verify_email_page_description: To continue, click the link sent to
sign.verify_email_not_verified_yet: Not verified yet. Please click the link in your email first.
sign.verify_email_account_mismatch: Signed in as {current}. This page is waiting for {expected}.
sign.email_password_name_required: Email, password, and name are required.

domestic_card.title: Domestic Card-Code Payment
domestic_card.description: Complete payment first, then come back here and redeem with your code.
domestic_card.step_1: Open the payment link below, pay successfully, and get your code on that page
domestic_card.step_2: Come back to this dialog, enter the code, and submit the redeem request
domestic_card.code_tip: Paste the code you received after payment to redeem your credits or plan
domestic_card.failed: Redeem failed, please try again later

errors.not_enabled: Domestic card-code payment is not enabled
errors.payment_link_missing: Payment link is not configured for this product
errors.payment_currency_missing: CNY price is not configured for this product
errors.code_invalid: Code not found. Please check and try again
errors.code_used: This code has already been used
errors.redeem_failed: Redeem failed, please try again later
